Wicked Wings Slaughter

Intro

 
A friendly and engaged atmospheric restaurant with awesome food and delicious drinks made your way. Kitchen and bar are open until 2am. Kareoke on Tuesday, Friday, and Sunday. Djs on Thursday, and Sunday. Cornhole tournaments on Mondays.
    Page · Bar & Grill
    615 West Slaughter Lane Ste 108, Austin, TX, United States, Texas
